name: tirmidhi
title: Sunan al-Tirmidhi
author: Imam Abu Isa al-Tirmidhi
description: Collection containing authentic, good, and weak hadith with scholarly commentary.

books.name: The Book on Purification
books.description: Comprehensive rulings on Taharah, including all forms of ritual purity required for acts of worship.

books.name: The Book on Salat (Prayer)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book on Al-Witr
books.description: The rulings and virtues of the odd-numbered night prayer (Witr) as a highly recommended Sunnah.

books.name: The Book on the Day of Friday
books.description: Special rulings and virtues corresponding to Jumu'ah (Friday) prayer and the Friday sermon (Khutbah).

books.name: The Book on the Two Eids
books.description: Guidance on the celebrations, prayers, and rulings of the two Islamic holidays: Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha.

books.name: The Book on Traveling
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book on Zakat
books.description: Comprehensive guide to the obligatory almsgiving (Zakat), detailing who must pay, allowable recipients, and calculable wealth types.

books.name: The Book on Fasting
books.description: Regulations regarding obligatory fasting during Ramadan and voluntary fasts throughout the year.

books.name: The Book on Hajj
books.description: Complete rites and spiritual significance of the major pilgrimage to Mecca (Hajj).

books.name: The Book on Jana''iz (Funerals)
books.description: Instructions on washing, shrouding, praying over, and burying the deceased, as well as mourning etiquette.

books.name: The Book on Marriage
books.description: Extensive teachings on the marital contract, domestic harmony, choosing a spouse, and spousal rights.

books.name: The Book on Suckling
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book on Divorce and Li'an
books.description: The procedures, cooling-off periods (Iddah), and regulations surrounding marital dissolution (Talaq).

books.name: The Book on Business
books.description: Islamic commercial law, including permissible trade, prohibited transactions, and business ethics.

books.name: The Chapters On Judgements From The Messenger of Allah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book on Blood Money
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book on Legal Punishments (Al-Hudud)
books.description: The prescribed penalties (Hudud) for major transgressions to preserve societal justice and security.

books.name: The Book on Hunting
books.description: Rules regarding lawful hunting practices, use of hunting animals, and slaughtering conditions.

books.name: The Book on Sacrifices
books.description: The Sunnah of ritual animal sacrifice during Eid al-Adha (Udhiyah) and child birth (Aqiqah).

books.name: The Book on Vows and Oaths
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: The Book on Military Expeditions
books.description: Historical accounts of military expeditions and battles led by the Prophet (ﷺ).

books.name: The Book on Virtues of Jihad
books.description: The principles of struggle, rules of military engagement, treaties, and the high status of martyrs.

books.name: The Book on Jihad
books.description: The principles of struggle, rules of military engagement, treaties, and the high status of martyrs.

books.name: The Book on Clothing
books.description: Islamic guidelines regarding modesty in dress, adornment, prohibitions on certain fabrics, and personal grooming.

books.name: The Book on Food
books.description: Dietary laws distinguishing lawful (Halal) provisions from unlawful (Haram) foods, and etiquette of eating.

books.name: The Book on Drinks
books.description: Permitted beverages, prohibitions on intoxicants, and the Prophetic manners for drinking.

books.name: Chapters on Righteousness And Maintaining Good Relations With Relatives
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters on Medicine
books.description: The Prophetic approach to health, remedies, diseases, and the balance between relying on Allah and seeking treatment.

books.name: Chapters On Inheritance
books.description: The complex and precise distribution of inherited wealth among surviving relatives as ordained in Islam.

books.name: Chapters On Wasaya (Wills and Testament)
books.description: Instructions on bequeathing property through a final testament (Wasiyyah) within permitted Islamic limits.

books.name: Chapters On Wala' And Gifts
books.description: The etiquette and legal parameters of giving gifts, transferring wealth, and fostering goodwill.

books.name: Chapters On Al-Qadar
books.description: Understanding the divine preordainment (Qadar) and trusting in Allah's ultimate plan.

books.name: Chapters On Al-Fitan
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters On Dreams
books.description: The significance of dreams, visions, and their interpretations in Islamic tradition.

books.name: Chapters On Witnesses
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters On Zuhd
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters on the description of the Day of Judgement, Ar-Riqaq, and Al-Wara'
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters on the description of Paradise
books.description: Vivid depictions of Jannah, its bounties, and the characteristics of its eternal inhabitants.

books.name: The Book on the Description of Hellfire
books.description: Warnings regarding Jahannam, its severities, and the causes that lead one toward it.

books.name: The Book on Faith
books.description: Fundamental teachings on faith (Iman), its branches, and matters of belief in Allah, His Angels, Books, Messengers, and the Last Day.

books.name: Chapters on Knowledge
books.description: The virtues of seeking Islamic knowledge, the etiquette of a student, and the responsibility of scholars to convey the truth.

books.name: Chapters on Seeking Permission
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters on Manners
books.description: The essence of excellent character (Adab), emphasizing respect, kindness, and societal morals.

books.name: Chapters on Parables
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters on The Virtues of the Qur'an
books.description: Accounts of the exceptional qualities and achievements of various Muslims and tribes.

books.name: Chapters on Recitation
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Chapters on Tafsir
books.description: The Prophetic exegesis and linguistic explanations illuminating the meanings of Quranic verses.

books.name: Chapters on Supplication
books.description: The texts and virtues of calling upon Allah (Du'a) in various situations.

books.name: Chapters on Virtues
books.description: Accounts of the exceptional qualities and achievements of various Muslims and tribes.
